title: desmodium kerrii
intro: Desmodium kerrii, also known as Thai jointfir or Thai indigo, is a perennial plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Desmodium kerrii include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. Desmodium kerrii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical creams and ointments.
